LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS VINCENT RAFANELLI, SARAH RAFANELLI, V. MARK RAFANELLI LIVING TRUST AND GREEN STREET FLATS LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND THE REVISED THIRD FLOOR PLAN ATTACHED THERETO UNAMBIGUOUSLY PROVIDE THAT THE DECK IS SUBJECT TO THE SET-BACK. AT THE VERY LEAST, THEE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE WHETHER THE DECK IS SUBJECT TO THE SETBACK. THE COURT WILL REVIEW ALL THE E-MAILS IT RECEIVED FROM THE PARTIES AND WILL SIGN THE ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.
